welcome.main: Explore our experimental AI-powered municipal services
welcome.subtitle: Choose a concept to get started

concept1.title: Concept 1: Intent Analysis
concept1.description: AI-powered intent recognition and form construction for municipal services. Record your voice and let our AI understand what you need.

concept2.title: Concept 2: Voice Recording
concept2.description: Voice-to-text transcription and AI assistance for municipal requests. Perfect for accessibility and hands-free interaction.

footer.disclaimer: This is a prototype for experimental AI municipal services. For testing purposes only.

messages.aiMessage: Incoming message from your personal AI agent:
messages.subsidyQuestion: Maybe you are eligible for a subsidy for the neighborhood party, shall I try to apply for this?
messages.ideas: What ideas do you already have for the neighborhood party? Then we'll take those into account.
messages.callout: Our prototype can now only help you with a few things: appealing a parking ticket, reporting a wrongly parked car, reporting something in public space, or requesting an event permit for a neighborhood party. Feel free to try it!

recording.addRecording: Add a recording or continue with request
recording.privacyNotice: What you record is not saved. It is automatically deleted.

errors.transcriptionFailed: Transcription failed. Please try recording again.
errors.testError: This is a test error message
errors.testWarning: This is a test warning message
errors.testInfo: This is a test info message
errors.transcriptionTimeout: Transcribing took longer than 20 seconds, please try again

concept1.callout: Our prototype can now only help you with a few things: appealing a parking ticket, reporting a wrongly parked car, reporting something in public space, or requesting an event permit for a neighborhood party. Feel free to try it!

choose.title: Choose a topic
choose.subtitle: We heard you say: {transcript}. We don't yet know exactly what you mean. This prototype only recognizes a few fixed topics. Choose one of the following topics to continue:

construct.formTitle: This is what you will submit:

feedback.title: Help design the future!
feedback.subtitle: In the future I want AI within the municipality...
feedback.privacy1: Don't tell personal information, like your name.
feedback.privacy2: Your idea is converted to text, we don't save audio recordings. This way we ensure your feedback remains anonymous. We use this text to discover what people find important.
feedback.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while submitting your feedback.
feedback.errorNetwork: Network error. Check your internet connection and try again.

finalThanks.title: Thank you!
finalThanks.message: Your feedback has been successfully submitted. We appreciate your contribution to the future of AI in the municipality.
finalThanks.autoRedirect: You will be automatically redirected to the homepage in 5 seconds.
